description_long: This object is a robust, rectangular storage chest with a domed, reinforced lid and a sturdy metal frame. The main body and lid are constructed from dark, horizontally-planked wood, bordered and segmented by thick, matte gray metal bands. The front face features a prominent keyhole set in a metal plate, suggesting it can be securely locked, while the sides display simple, rectangular metal fixtures that may serve as decorative or structural elements. The wood grain is visible, giving the chest a rustic, weathered appearance, while the metal parts add an industrial touch. The overall design is reminiscent of a treasure chest or secure storage box, suitable for protecting valuables or tools. Its size and construction imply it is intended for placement on the ground in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A sturdy, domed wooden storage chest reinforced with thick gray metal bands and a keyhole lock on the front. The chest has a rustic, secure appearance, suitable for urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid, wood planks, thick metal frame, and a central keyhole lock plate.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved lid, horizontal wood planks, and a rectangular metal fixture on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the domed lid and wood planks, with no lock or keyhole visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the same metal fixture and wood planks as the other side, no keyhole present.
